docs.text: Hosting personal web page generated from mkdocs password protect pages Source: https://pypi.org/project/mkdocs-encryptcontent-plugin/ install mkdocs-encryptcontent-plugin pip install mkdocs-encryptcontent-plugin Enable the plugin in your mkdocs.yml: plugins: - search: {} - encryptcontent: {} Add global password: plugins: - encryptcontent: global_password: 'your_password' To enable remember password: plugins: - encryptcontent: remember_password: True default_expire_delay: 24 # <-- Default expire delay in hours (optional) To override global password, add password to page using password metadata: --- password: 'new_password' --- Note Use empty password to disable password: --- password: '' --- hosting in GitHub Page Based on https://docs.github.com/en/pages/quickstart login github.com; username: bcwwong(busywong@gmail.com); password: Skxxxxxx@xxx; Recovery code: bd411-0d59a 6003e-c6565 54781-28e47 f25d1-c4467 8b08c-3cc73 d5de3-76417 cc254-02da8 d1824-9b035 d1c66-58787 1e2eb-20819 e90d3-18b9f f154c-ddb11 5bc50-d8848 8ad03-7c741 ba1a3-32391 70869-e580b Create new repository, use username.github.io as the repository name (e.g. bcwwong.github.io) Download GitHub Desktop: File | Clone repository (bcwwong/bcwwong.github.io); specify local path to store repository Set mkdocs output directory the same as the local directory for github repository site_dir: '..\Documents\GitHub\bcwwong.github.io' build site: mkdocs build GitHub Desktop: Give Summary (e.g. 2023-07-30); Commit to main hosting in Google Drive
docs.title: Web site
Hosting personal web page generated from mkdocs

docs.text: Source: https://pypi.org/project/mkdocs-encryptcontent-plugin/ install mkdocs-encryptcontent-plugin pip install mkdocs-encryptcontent-plugin Enable the plugin in your mkdocs.yml: plugins: - search: {} - encryptcontent: {} Add global password: plugins: - encryptcontent: global_password: 'your_password' To enable remember password: plugins: - encryptcontent: remember_password: True default_expire_delay: 24 # <-- Default expire delay in hours (optional) To override global password, add password to page using password metadata: --- password: 'new_password' --- Note Use empty password to disable password: --- password: '' ---
docs.title: password protect pages
